name: vgc-team-tests
description: Declarative, composable 'unit tests' for VGC (doubles, bring-6-choose-4) Pokemon teams. A JSON Schema + reference-data design; the evaluator/runner is future work.

scripts.build:types: json2ts -i schema/team-test-suite.schema.json -o types/suite.d.ts && json2ts -i schema/team-test-report.schema.json -o types/report.d.ts
